title: Armor - rekt
relevance_summary: Insurance policy manipulation by team members leading to loss of insured funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers staked NFTs without user approval

red_flags: Staking contract upgrade allowing admin to transfer NFTs
summary: Armor's team manipulated the staking contract to transfer staked NFTs to their own wallets, leading to a loss of insured funds worth $1.6 million. A guard could have prevented this by blocking any NFT transfers without user approval.
